articles.author: Tim Fernholz
articles.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident - TechCrunch
articles.description: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.
articles.content:
Anthropic accidentally caused thousands of code repositories on GitHub to be taken down while trying to pull copies of its most popular product’s source code off the internet.
On Tuesday, a software… [+1510 chars]
